Short vvol day | Intraday post (02/Jan)

Wish you all a happy and successful New Year! Don’t forget my new year mail for you :))

Weekly post:

"This time is different" | Weekly post (29/Dec - 02/Jan)

Last week, I expressed that I’m not a fan of a big Santa-rally anymore, after the tape left a lot of fragility behind, while geo risk premium and stagflation risk remains high. Voilá…

Soon - maybe after New Year - I will drop a post updating the earlier “AI bubble” post. A lot of challanges are coming for 2026…

Now, let’s jump in to the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Customers are selling intraday RV into both direction centering around 6886.40, but like 4x more vol selling to the upside, creating a net positive speed profile. Downside vol of vol is sold too. The centroid of the profile is at 6904.21However I would mark 6890 as a line in the sand for today session. Market most likely is either above or below this zone.

Downside pivot is at 6869.76with target of 6828.87, that is a sticky zone, with margin of error of 6812But I would mark 6855 too as a local support, being sticky into the PM session, with margin of error of 6850

Upside pivot is at 6921.84with target of 6933.45, during the PM it acts like a line in the sand, making the spot either being pinned to 6940 or to 6920 (less chance for 6940).

By such a huge amount of vol of vol being sold, I don’t expect a good tradeable day.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
